series_metadata.series_title: General Inquiry and Internal Investigation Records
series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence or other documented requests for investigating an employee and/or referrals for investigations. Records also include all data, documentation regarding the investigation (i.e., request, referrals, case notes, interviews, preliminary investigation, etc.). Investigations may also contain confidential ODJFS constituent records regarding public assistance, fostercare, unemployment compensation, health care, etc. which is protected by law.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 30 days after completion of investigation or decision not to investigate, then prepped, scan (image), and quality control is completed, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years providing no administrative or legal action is pending ,then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
